paragraphs: Fermi Inc's stock price is 6.05, with a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over the last 20 sessions. The price is as of July 17, 2026.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's governance and a recent convertible notes offering, with one director resigning due to governance concerns. There are also mentions of the stock's price movement and retail traders' reactions to the news. Sources of the news include Stocktwits, simplywall.st, and Yahoo Finance.

There have been recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form detailing the issuance of $431.25 million in convertible senior notes and the resignation of director Miles Everson. Another filing, a SCHEDULE 13D/A, was submitted on July 8, 2026, and a DFAN14A filing was made by Toby R. Neugebauer and other parties regarding the withdrawal of their solicitation to call a special meeting of shareholders. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
